name: caller_identity_lookup
description: Recognises returning customers by their phone number. Retrieves name, vehicle history and last service date from the workshop management system or CRM booking history.
requires: Workshop management system integration (Mechanic Desk, Workshop Plus, or PB bookings history)
Fallback: query PB bookings collection for matching caller_phone
el_call_timing: Invoke at conversation start before greeting — pass caller phone as dynamic variable from ElevenLabs call metadata
notes: ElevenLabs passes caller phone via dynamic variable 'caller_id' if configured on the agent. Without WMS integration, fall back to querying PB bookings for returning customer detection.
